trickyParts: Rebase onto main dropped all #275 code because #276 introduced createRetryWithFallback for transient errors in the same file. Had to re-add the model fallback executor with the new name executeWithModelFallback.
The PR's FallbackChain type was superseded by ModelFallbackChain from #276. Adapted executeWithModelFallback to accept Iterable<string> instead.
Resolved 2 conflict files (.legion/retro.json and docs/solutions/index.json) by merging both sides.
deviations: P2-2 (FallbackChain type placement) became N/A — type superseded by ModelFallbackChain from #276
P3-1 (iterator simplification) became N/A — manual iterator no longer exists post-rebase
executeWithModelFallback uses Iterable<string> instead of the old FallbackChain type for better decoupling
